steps.title: Read the Tikal row
steps.content: The sentence asks specifically how long ago Tikal Temple IV was built. The relevant table entry for Tikal Temple IV gives its age before present.

steps.title: Use the matching age
steps.content: Choice A, Choice C, and Choice D correspond to other pyramids' age ranges, not Tikal Temple IV. The table's Tikal Temple IV entry gives 1,300 years ago. The answer is B.
